---
title: "Gelber Ochse"
authors:
  - name: "Moritz"
    url: "https://github.com/Moritz"
  - name: "Dr Gottlieb Taft"
    url: "https://github.com/Dr Gottlieb Taft"
authors_links: "[Moritz](https://github.com/Moritz), [Dr Gottlieb Taft](https://github.com/Dr Gottlieb Taft)"
rank: 5
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="Screencast Projekt 3.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**

<iframe src="Projekt_Testprojekt-2.html" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="1200" style="border:0"></iframe>
